title: Rogue
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Rogue}}
'''''Rogue''''' was a pair of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

When the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] group ''[[Ethar]]'' was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] near [[Despayre]], the Alliance mounted a rescue attempt. The operation comprised three waves. First, three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], [[Casal Marskan]] and [[Horodi]], arrived to engage the Gunboats. Three minutes later, two groups of three [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue]] and [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold]] squadrons arrived and attempted to disable the corvettes. Six minutes after the arrival of the Y-wings, ''Rogue'' group arrived to recapture the corvettes.

While the fighters kept the Imperial [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] at bay, ''Rogue'' group was able to complete their boarding operation and both ''Rogue'' and ''Ethar'' groups escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
